title: URVRSP-069 [VR] I couldn't realize her true feelings. . . Maria
description: On a hot summer day, my childhood friend Maria returns to the countryside for the first time in five years. Unlike when she lived in her hometown, she now looks like a sophisticated city girl. We went to the same elementary, middle, and high school, so I was surprised to see him again after such a long time, but he pulled me out and said, ``I need to talk to you.'' When I asked him about it, he confessed, ``I've loved him for a long time.'' I didn't really realize it because we'd been together since we were little, but as we moved away and didn't see each other anymore, I started thinking about Maria too. Maria and I confirmed our feelings for each other and crossed the line. That night, Maria was told the real reason for her return...
